raw_consumer_statement:
I ordered a replacement card. For whatever reason they had to cancel the old account. I paid it down to a zero dollar balance. I don't want to use the card for the time being. I got an email yesterday on XX/XX/year> which does not make sense because that old account number is no longer valid and canceled. It even shows on my AMEX login as canceled. Yet they still somehow allowed charges to go through on my card. I do not have anyone else on my card or a cosigner. But if a corporation has millions of dollars they can just decide to charge my card whenever they want. 

The manager was not helpful and did not want to help or offer a resolution. He even just asked me to call back. It wasn't until I continued to mention that I want an actual manager to help that he said he can have someone call me back.

I am tired of this treatment. I have had nothing but issues with American Express. There is zero accountability with American Express.
